What We Offer

Everything Your Listing Needs

One company, all the measurements and media your listing needs — delivered next day.

📐

ANSI Floor Plans

Professionally measured and ANSI-certified floor plans that meet MLS standards. Delivered in digital format, ready to attach to any listing.

  • ANSI Z765 compliant
  • Accurate to 1%
  • Digital delivery
  • MLS-ready
Learn more→
📸

MLS Photography

High-quality interior and exterior photography that makes listings stand out. Wide-angle, HDR-enhanced images optimized for MLS platforms.

  • HDR photography
  • Wide-angle lenses
  • Exterior & interior
  • MLS-optimized
Learn more→
🚁

Drone Add-On

Aerial photography and video to showcase properties, lots, and neighborhood context. FAA-licensed drone operators.

  • FAA licensed
  • Aerial photos & video
  • Lot showcasing
  • Neighborhood views
Learn more→
🏠

Homeowner Packages

Planning a renovation or selling your home? Get precise measurements and professional photos to make confident decisions.

  • Pre-listing prep
  • Renovation planning
  • Insurance claims
  • Estate planning
Learn more→
Sample Work

Precision You Can
See on Paper.

Every floor plan we deliver is ANSI Z765 certified — accurate to within 1%, clearly labeled, and formatted exactly the way MLS platforms expect. No guesswork. No disputes.

  • ✓Room-by-room dimensions labeled clearly
  • ✓Above-grade finished sq. ft. calculated per ANSI Z765
  • ✓Delivered as PDF and digital file — MLS ready
  • ✓Next-day turnaround, every time
View Measurement Packages→
ANSI
Certified
Trusted by 400+ Realtors

What Realtors Are Saying

“Square Up Measuring is my go-to for every listing. The floor plans are spot-on and I always get them the next day. My clients love the professionalism.”
SM
Sarah Mitchell
Realtor, Keller Williams Fort Mill
“I've used them for 50+ listings across the Carolinas. Accurate, fast, and the photography makes my listings pop on Zillow and the MLS.”
JH
James Harrington
Broker, RE/MAX Carolina
“As a homeowner getting ready to sell, I had no idea how important accurate square footage was. They made the whole process easy and the photos were beautiful.”
LC
Linda Chen
Homeowner, Rock Hill SC
“The drone shots sold my listing before the open house. Veteran-owned business that delivers exactly what they promise. Highly recommend.”

Marcus Thompson

“Switched to Square Up two years ago and never looked back. Every single floor plan has been ANSI compliant and my buyers trust the numbers.”
